title: Indulgent Spanish Almonds Bowl
description: A nutty, fluffy tapas platter with toasted almonds, puffed rice, basil, and a sweet lime-honey glaze, served in an earthenware bowl.
instructions: Spread almonds on a baking sheet and toast for 8-10 minutes until golden.
While almonds toast, heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and sauté finely chopped red onion until translucent.
Add smoked paprika and red pepper flakes to the onions, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in lime juice and honey, allowing the mixture to thicken slightly.
Remove the toasted almonds from the oven and let them cool.
In the skillet, combine the sautéed onion mixture with the cooled almonds, puffed rice, and chopped basil, tossing gently.
Season the bowl with sea salt to taste and sprinkle chopped parsley for freshness.
Transfer the mixture to an earthenware bowl, garnish with extra toasted almonds, and serve immediately as a tapas platter.
